config.image_generation.disabled_notice: A geração de imagens está desativada
config.image_generation.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle above to let the agent generate images from text prompts using AI models.
config.image_generation.provider_desc: Select a provider configured in Provider Management. Supported types: OpenAI, OpenRouter, Stability AI, Ideogram, Google Imagen, MiniMax.
config.image_generation.defaults_desc: Valores padrão usados quando o agente não os especifica em uma chamada de ferramenta.
config.image_generation.enhancement_desc: Configure prompt enhancement and usage limits.
config.image_generation.prompt_enhanceme: Prompt enhancement (LLM improves prompts before generation):
config.image_generation.test_desc: Generate a test image to verify provider connectivity.
